steps.title: Read the sentence as a series
steps.content: The sentence lists three actions by more advanced floats: measure more variables, travel to greater depths, and monitor seasonal ice zones. The blank must punctuate the first two items in that series.

steps.title: Use commas between items
steps.content: A uses a colon in a simple series, C omits the comma after "variables," and D uses a semicolon before the final item. The correct completion uses commas after "variables" and "depths" to separate the three parallel actions. The answer is B.
